title: scalia gracilis
intro: Scalia gracilis, also known as the Chinese club moss, is a type of lycophyte plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Scalia gracilis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Scalia gracilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
